_comment: Phase 1 §1.D semantic-golden fixture for Form 1301 — REGENERATED after the BiDi-correct hebrewForPdf rewrite + the route's DRAW_LIST_1301 / POSITIONAL_DRAWS_1301 refactor. See semanticGolden135.expected.json for the layout description and BiDi rationale. Hebrew strings now appear in LOGICAL Unicode order ("בר", "תל", "אביב", "דיזנגוף", "אוהד") because lib/bidi.ts:shapeForPdf() retired the codepoint-reversal hack. The page-3 entry now also includes "אוהד" before the tax-year because the new POSITIONAL_DRAWS_1301 entry for code 031 (first name) lands on page 1 (tail of page 1's text stream). Page 4 now carries the signature block ("אוהד", "בר", date, "X") that the new POSITIONAL_DRAWS_1301 entry adds — Phase 1 §1.D's signature/declaration parity with Form 135. `requiredCodes` is the set of 3-digit codes the route's draws[] list expects the template to still print.
